class.name: drive_train_controller/DriveTrainController
class.description: DriveTrain Controller subscribing to cmd_vel and sending wheel velocities

class.name: drive_train_hardware/DriveTrainHardware
class.description: Fake hardware interface publishing wheel velocities instead of real hardware control

class.name: arm_controller/ArmController
class.description: Arm Controller subscribing to cmd_vel and sending wheel velocities

class.name: arm_hardware/ArmHardware
class.description: Fake hardware interface publishing motor velocities instead of real hardware control
